title: AI Safety Research Scientist
description: Work on interpretability, alignment, and evaluation research to make large language models safer and more reliable. Collaborate with a team of researchers to publish work and shape Anthropic's safety roadmap.

title: Biosecurity Policy Analyst
org: Johns Hopkins Center for Health Security
description: Analyse biosecurity threats and develop policy recommendations for governments and international bodies. Publish reports, engage with policymakers, and contribute to pandemic preparedness frameworks.

title: Operations Manager
description: Keep GiveWell's research and outreach running smoothly. Own internal systems, coordinate across teams, manage vendors, and help scale the organisation as it grows.

title: Software Engineer — AI Governance Tools
description: Build tools and infrastructure to support AI governance research, including datasets, evaluation pipelines, and public-facing dashboards used by policymakers and researchers worldwide.

title: Global Health Economist
description: Conduct cost-effectiveness analysis of global health interventions to inform grant-making decisions. Work involves quantitative modelling, literature reviews, and collaborating with implementing organisations.

title: Communications Lead
description: Shape FLI's public narrative on AI and existential risk. Write articles, manage media relationships, create content, and help translate complex technical ideas into compelling public communications.

title: Community Builder — EA University Groups
description: Support and grow EA university groups across the UK and Europe. Run retreats, provide resources, coach group organisers, and help students explore high-impact career paths.

title: Machine Learning Engineer — Safety
description: Build and scale experiments for DeepMind's safety research team. Work at the interface of research and engineering to implement new ideas quickly and rigorously.

title: Malaria Programme Officer
description: Manage delivery of seasonal malaria chemoprevention programmes across Sub-Saharan Africa. Coordinate with government partners, oversee data collection, and ensure high-quality programme implementation.

title: Research Analyst — Longtermism
description: Produce in-depth research reports on high-impact giving opportunities in longtermist cause areas. Advise major donors and help them direct large amounts of capital to the highest-leverage interventions.

title: AI Policy Fellow
description: Advise UK government departments on AI regulation and governance. Brief ministers, draft policy papers, and engage with industry and civil society on responsible AI deployment.

title: Data Scientist — Global Health
description: Use data to help NGOs and governments make better decisions about health and development programmes. Design evaluations, build dashboards, and translate findings into actionable recommendations.

title: Fundraising Manager
description: Grow AMF's donor base by cultivating relationships with major donors, managing campaigns, and communicating impact. Work directly with the founder in a small, high-trust team.

title: Nuclear Security Researcher
description: Research nuclear security risks and develop recommendations to reduce the likelihood of nuclear weapons use. Engage with governments, international organisations, and arms control experts.

title: Head of Talent
description: Help high-potential individuals find high-impact careers. Run hiring processes for EA organisations, build talent pipelines, and directly advise people navigating career decisions in the EA ecosystem.
